description: REQ-015 specifies that on EmptyNoteDiscarded (REQ-003), the state does NOT transition to 'saving'. Neither PROP-019 nor PROP-020 nor any other PROP verifies this negative constraint. The EmptyNoteDiscarded path's state preservation has no proof obligation.

evidence.snippet:
| PROP-019 | `EditingSessionState` transitions: `editing → saving → editing` on success | REQ-015 | 2 | false |
| PROP-020 | `EditingSessionState` transitions: `editing → saving → save-failed` on failure | REQ-015 | 2 | false |
